name: Dusk
effect: Confirm all eyes shut; resolve any dusk‑timed Travellers or Fabled.
If a Minion was executed today, make every player drunk tonight.
Philosopher may adopt any good ability; if duplicated, the original becomes drunk.
Sailor chooses a player; either that player or the Sailor is drunk.
Engineer may swap the Demon or all Minions; let them know.
Preacher chooses a player; if a Minion, they lose the ability & learn who the Preacher is.
Update the night marker. If this is X, everyone is poisoned.
Poisoner poisons a player.
Update night marker. Otherwise the Courtier might make a character drunk.
Innkeeper chooses 2 players; they are both safe, but 1 is drunk.
Gambler might guess a player & their character;  they die if wrong.
If either good living neighbour is drunk or poisoned, the Acrobat dies.
Snake Charmer chooses a player; if Demon, swap tokens & poison new Snake Charmer.
Monk chooses a player; they're safe from the Demon.
Organ Grinder may make themself drunk.
Devil's Advocate chooses a player; they're safe from execution.
Witch curses a player.
Cerenovus makes a player mad as a chosen good character.
Pit-Hag changes a player into another good character if possible; they learn this.
The speaker of the password turns evil.
Harpy makes a player mad another is evil.
If the Scarlet Woman became the Demon, let them know.
Update night marker. Night 3, Summoner make a player the Demon; let them know.
Simulate Demon attack; reveal to the Demon the Lunatic's targets.
Exorcist chooses a player; if the Demon, block their attack & reveal to them the Exorcist.
Lycanthrope chooses a living player; if good, they die and are the only player that dies tonight.
A player might die.
The Imp kills a player; if themselves, a Minion becomes the Imp; let them know.
If no one died today: Zombuul kills a player.
Previously poisoned player dies. Pukka poisons a player.
May revive a player eaten last night. The Shabaloth chooses 2 players to die.
Po chooses 0, 1, or 3 players to die.
Fang Gu chooses a character to die; if 1st Outsider, they become a Fang Gu, & original dies; let them know.
No Dashii kills a player.
Vortox kills a player.
Lord of Typhon kills a player.
Vigormortis kills a player; if a Minion, they keep ability & poison a neighbour Townsfolk.
Ojo chooses a character; if not in play, a player dies.
Let the Minions choose the Lil' Monsta token babysitter. A player dies.
Lleech kills a player.
Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 players; each player secretly chooses to live or die.
For each Yaggababble marker, a player might die.
Kazali kills a player.
Assassin kills a player, ignoring any protections.
If an Outsider died today: Godfather kills a player.
The gossip was true, a player dies.
If dead: Demons and Minions can change characters.
If dead, the Demon might swap two players; let them know.
If dead, a player becomes drunk.
If dead: pick a Minion ability to have.
If died tonight, indicate 2 players, 1 being the Demon.
If killed by the Demon: reveal the Banshee publicly; give them their ability.
Professor chooses a dead player: if Townfolk, they revive.
If the Demon killed the King, indicate who the Demon is.
Huntsman may choose a player; if Damsel, they become a Townsfolk; let them know.
Amnesiac may wake, and might take actions.
If died tonight, a good player becomes a Farmer; let them know.
Tinker might die.
The chosen player dies, if good.
If the grandchild died tonight, the Grandmother dies.
If they died tonight, Ravenkeeper chooses a player, & learns their character.
Indicate how many neighbours are evil.
Fortune Teller chooses 2 players. Indicate if either is the Demon.
Reveal the player executed today.
Dreamer chooses a player. Reveal 1 true & 1 false character.
Indicate if the Demon voted.
Indicate if a Minion nominated.
Indicate how many dead players are evil.
Seamstress may choose 2 players. Indicate if they're aligned.
Indicate how many guesses were correct.
Indicate a player of a character type not yet shown.
Each Village Idiot chooses a player; indicate their alignment.
If the dead outnumber the living, reveal an alive character to the King.
If the target died today or tonight, indicate to the Bounty Hunter their new target.
If the Cult Leader changes alignment, let them know.
If the Goon changes alignment, let them know.
Butler chooses a Master.
Show the Spy the Grimoire.
Indicate the best player to speak to.
Indicate which side is winning.
Chambermaid chooses 2 players; indicate how many acted tonight.
Indicate how many abilities malfunctioned today & tonight.

name: Dawn
effect: Wake all players up. Announce the night's results.
Reveal that a Leviathan is in play. Update the day marker.
